rules.subject: project
rules.requirement: A project declares a semantic codexVersion.

rules.subject: project
rules.requirement: A project has a valid stable identifier.

rules.subject: project
rules.requirement: A project contains an objects collection.

rules.subject: object
rules.requirement: Object identifiers are syntactically valid and unique.

rules.subject: object
rules.requirement: Object types and lifecycle states are registered.

rules.subject: object
rules.requirement: Objects have non-empty titles and semantic versions.

rules.subject: relation
rules.requirement: Relation types are registered and targets exist.

rules.subject: relation
rules.requirement: Relation endpoints satisfy registered source and target constraints.

rules.subject: relation
rules.requirement: Forbidden self-references and cycles are rejected.

rules.subject: provenance
rules.requirement: Provenance identifiers are valid and resolve to existing distinct objects.

rules.subject: provenance
rules.requirement: Translations and commentaries identify scholarly sources or subjects.

rules.subject: graph
rules.requirement: Strict-profile objects are reachable from a containment root.

rules.subject: schema
rules.requirement: Project values satisfy the CODEX structural schema.

rules.subject: package
rules.requirement: Package files match the sealed manifest and SHA-256 checksums.

rules.subject: profile
rules.requirement: Profiles declare identity, compatibility, inheritance, and extensions without weakening Core.
